pr.title: feat: paper SELL, full PnL tracking and sell alerts (Prompt 2)
pr.body:
## Summary

Implements the full BUY → SELL → PnL cycle for paper trading, completing Prompt 2.

### Changes by file:

**`app/models.py`** — New columns on `OpenPosition`:
- `exit_price` (Float, nullable) — price at which position was closed
- `closed_at` (DateTime, nullable) — timestamp of close
- `pnl_rub` (Float, nullable) — realized profit/loss in RUB
- `pnl_pct` (Float, nullable) — realized profit/loss percentage

**`app/database.py`** — `migrate_open_positions()`:
- Safe SQLite migration via `ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN` (skips if column exists)

**`main.py`** — Calls `migrate_open_positions()` at startup after `create_all()`

**`app/paper_trading.py`** — New functions:
- `execute_paper_sell(item_name, current_price, fee_pct)` — closes open position, calculates `net_revenue = price * (1 - fee/100)`, computes PnL, deposits net revenue to wallet, returns trade summary dict
- `get_closed_positions()` — returns all closed positions for dashboard

**`app/signals.py`** — SELL signal handling:
- On SELL signal, calls `execute_paper_sell()` to close the position
- Sends `send_sell_alert()` via Telegram if configured
- Falls back gracefully if no open position exists

**`app/notifier.py`** — `send_sell_alert(trade)`:
- Russian-format Telegram message: 🔴 ЗАКРЫТО: {item} / Вход → Выход / PnL / Баланс

**`web/dashboard.py`** — Dashboard enhancements:
- **Unrealized PnL column** on open positions table: `(current_price × 0.85 - entry_price) × qty`
- **Closed positions section** with entry/exit/PnL table + win rate stats
- **Total PnL (realized)** metric card replacing the old placeholder PnL

**`PROJECT_CONTEXT.md`** — Prompt 2 marked as Done

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Run the monitor, trigger a BUY (or manually insert a test position), then verify SELL closes it correctly with proper PnL calculation
- [ ] Verify PnL math: `net_revenue = exit_price × 0.85`, `pnl_rub = (net_revenue - entry_price) × qty`
- [ ] Check dashboard shows unrealized PnL for open positions and closed positions section
- [ ] Verify Telegram sell alert fires with correct Russian format (if Telegram is configured)
- [ ] Test migration: start with an existing DB that has old `open_positions` table — confirm new columns are added safely

Recommended test: Create a paper BUY at 500₽, then trigger SELL at 600₽. Expected: net_revenue = 510₽, pnl = +10₽ (+2.0%), balance increases by 510₽.

### Notes

- The migration uses `ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN` which is safe for SQLite (no-op if column exists)
- `execute_paper_sell` deposits `net_revenue × quantity` back to wallet (after Steam fee deduction)
- SELL alert uses a local import of `get_balance` to avoid circular import with wallet module

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/7c96df8e2c9d441e8404501a24d1b54e
Requested by: @nytick52nn-crypto
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
